title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.9 - Auto Tune: now gains Retain when upgraded, reworded more concisely, and its per-turn pump increases all Tuned by the power's amount (stacks if replayed). Roll With It: now always draws 1 card and Inverts 2 (3 upgraded) instead of drawing more. Requires BaseLib.
